value.reason: The cited page is from "Antigravity 2.0" — not Google — so it cannot validate any Google capability at all. Additionally, the page primarily documents a "Subagents" feature (the `invoke_subagent` tool, async delegation, lifecycle states, inter-agent messaging), which is the ADJACENT capability the cell must be distinct from. The multi-agent teamwork feature described at the bottom of the page (`/teamwork-preview`) is real but is a tiny sub-section of a subagents page from a non-Google provider. The cell label "Multi-Agent Orchestration" and its description (central orchestrator, synchronous/asynchronous coordination, retry/error-recovery) loosely match the `/teamwork-preview` blurb, but since the provider is wrong (Antigravity, not Google) and the page is fundamentally about subagent delegation — the adjacent capability — documents_capability, label_ok, and description_ok all fail.
